para_trans: The amount for Sangola Municipal Council, District Solapur under Head of Accounts (4217 0603) for the year 2022-23 is Rs. 5. 00 crores (purse)
Government Correctional Certificate No: - NABARD-2023 / P.No.87 (B-20) / NAB-16
(1) Department of Urban Development, Government Decision No: - NABARD-2024 / No.87 (B-20) / NABARD-16 dated 29th March, 2023.
Municipal councils in the state are given special grants for "specialty" work. under reference
Chowkidar Niwas at Wadegaon Road Water Tank, No. 8, Government Colony, No. (1)
Construction and installation of patchwork blocks. (Amount Rs. 25.00 Attention) The work is not ordered to start, and
Cancellation of the said works subject to the condition that there is a time limit for expenditure of funds and in lieu thereof.
The works in the attached returns are being approved through a government certificate.
2. Reference No. (1) The other terms and conditions of the Government decision herein shall continue.
This government certificate is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
